_provenance.note: Optimization priors for the second real-paper decomposition (Epic V): the results Nesterov's accelerated gradient method builds on, lifted into grounded dgroups by an in-session sub-agent. Sharing functor vocabulary with grounding/dgroups/nesterov_paper.json so set-cover decomposition explains the paper as {estimate_sequence builds the momentum} + a residual that is its genuine contribution (the OPTIMAL accelerated rate). Grounded; checked by grounding.verify.

gradient_descent_smooth.name: gradient_descent_smooth
gradient_descent_smooth.text: On a smooth convex function, plain gradient descent converges to the minimizer at a sublinear convergence rate.

estimate_sequence.name: estimate_sequence
estimate_sequence.text: For a smooth convex function, Nesterov's estimate-sequence technique builds a momentum extrapolation step from successive gradient information.
